chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-1114 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For Katcha Peshi. 02.11.2017. Mr. Abdul Khalique Laghari, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, A.A.G. alongwith Mr. Muhammad Raheem Executive Engineer, Rohri Canal Division Hyderabad. Mr. Muhammad Raheem Executive Engineer Rohri Canal Division Hyderabad has appeared and has undertaken that the due water would be provided to the petitioner according to their entitlement as per working share list of the subject water course without any hindrance, which has satisfied the Counsel for the petitioners, who seeks disposal of this petition in the said terms. This petition is disposed of in the above terms. However, the compliance report be submitted by the said Executive Engineer after 15 days. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
